query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS supplier_api_logs (
  id int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY,
  importKey varchar(255),
  rawPayload text NOT NULL,
  totalItems int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  matchedItems int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  unmatchedItems int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  errorItems int NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  resultsJson text,
  ipAddress varchar(100),
  userAgent varchar(500),
  success boolean NOT NULL DEFAULT true,
  errorMessage text,
  createdAt timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX sal_created_at_idx (createdAt),
  INDEX sal_import_key_idx (importKey)
);
